title: Spend a full day journaling — morning pages, midday check-in, evening review
flavour: three sessions. one day. you'll understand yourself differently by evening.

title: Sign up for a class or course on something you've wanted to learn for years
flavour: you've said 'one day' enough. today one day becomes day one.

title: Do a complete social media detox for the day — delete the apps if needed
flavour: the feed isn't going anywhere. you are. see you on the other side.

title: Read an entire long-form essay, book chapter, or paper on a topic that genuinely challenges your worldview
flavour: not to agree. not to fight. to be changed slightly. that's the point.

title: Have a serious conversation with yourself — what are you running from right now?
flavour: the avoidance has a shape. sit with it. name it. don't fix it yet.

title: Spend 3 hours in a library, museum, or archive exploring something with no agenda
flavour: no goal. no outcome. just curiosity with legs. follow whatever calls.

title: Write a 500-word honest reflection on where you are vs where you thought you'd be
flavour: the gap between expected and actual is data. write it down. don't edit it.

title: Spend a morning meditating for 45 minutes — sit with the discomfort
flavour: your brain will throw everything at you. watch it. don't run.

title: Create a personal manifesto — your values, how you want to live, what you won't compromise on
flavour: you've been operating on default settings. today you write your own firmware.

title: Spend the day without complaining — notice every time you want to and choose otherwise
flavour: complaint detected. complaining noted. replacing with observation. repeat.
